behavior_in_task_description.reason: The instruction says the marker is 'the identifier registered for this test suite' but never names it; tests assert specifically that pytestmark evaluates to pytest.mark.sglang, and 'sglang' is not mentioned anywhere in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies exact parameter changes: 'consumer_batch_size argument must be >= 3', 'max_head_offpolicyness argument must be >= 100', 'must be changed to use tmp_path_factory parameter instead of tmp_path', and 'any test method whose name contains should_accept_fn must be removed' — these are the fix itself, not just the bug.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept scope in ('module','session'), values >= thresholds, and check general structure rather than exact gold values (e.g., gold uses 4 and 1024, tests accept >=3 and >=100).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use AST parsing and subprocess evaluation of decorator expressions with mocked pytest to verify runtime values, not raw text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p check requires actual code changes (module scope, pytestmark assignment, removed decorators, raised constants); a stub cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All five expected behaviors in instruction.md (module scope, tmp_path_factory, pytestmark marker, removed @pytest.mark.slow, raised settings, removed should_accept_fn tests) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section comments (Gate, Fail-to-pass pr_diff, Fail-to-pass agent_config) with descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies test files, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction.md match the repo layout and test assertions.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names exact fixture names (gateway_controller, gateway_controller_full_init, local_scheduler), exact kwargs (consumer_batch_size, max_head_offpolicyness), and exact parameter substitution (tmp_path_factory replacing tmp_path) — fully localizing the fix.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task; no config edits involved.
